name: Pasta and Chick Pea Soup
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Drained canned Italian tomatoes, chopped
8 ounces Drained canned chick-peas, reserve 1/2 cup liquid
1 1/2 teaspoons Shredded fresh basil (1/2 teaspoon dried)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1-quart saucepan, heat oil over medium heat; add onion and garlic and saute until onion is translucent.
2. Add tomatoes and bring to a boil. Reduce heat and let simmer for 5 minutes.
3. Add chick-peas with reserved liquid and remaining ingredients; cook until heated through.
4. Serve garnished with basil sprigs.
Makes 2 servings.
